summary_raw: Middle East war disrupting energy markets, Strait of Hormuz closure threat. US tariff uncertainty ongoing. US intervention in Venezuela. Chinese overcapacity pressure on semiconductors including mature node chips. Morgan Stanley still bullish on S&P 500 near double-digit returns.
